title: Y@hownadab #3082
definition:
Jehonadab = "Jehovah is willing"

 1) a son of Rechab, chief of the Rechabites, in the time of Jehu and Ahab
 2) a nephew of David
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jehonadab = "Jehovah is willing"

 1) a son of Rechab, chief of the Rechabites, in the time of Jehu and Ahab
 2) a nephew of David

    NASB:  the LORD is noble, a Rechabite, also a nephew of David
